relationship.description: Each POST can have multiple POST_TAG rows; FK_POST_TAG_post_id references POST.post_id
Each TAG can appear in multiple POST_TAG rows; FK_POST_TAG_tag_id references TAG.tag_id
One POST can be associated with many ASSOC_POST_TAG.
One TAG can be associated with many ASSOC_POST_TAG.

metadata.improvements_made: Added explicit foreign‑key intent in relationship descriptions, defined composite primary key (post_id, tag_id) for POST_TAG to enforce uniqueness, clarified that POST_TAG.created_at records association time, and noted indexing strategy for time‑based queries. No unnecessary entities were introduced.
